palette_hint: Deep charcoal background #1A1A1F, warm off-white text #F0EBE1, primary accent saffron gold #E8A020, secondary accent dusty rose #C4706A
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif, bold 700 weight with wide letter-spacing for gravitas; body in system-ui sans-serif at 400 weight, 1.7 line-height for an editorial feel
description: Auric Veld Studio is a Johannesburg-based brand-identity agency whose website uses aggressive SVG geometry, diagonal cuts, and masked photography stand-ins to express that brand design is simultaneously architecture and emotion.
constraints: Every page section boundary uses a clip-path polygon cut at a 6-degree angle instead of a straight horizontal rule, alternating the slant direction per section
The site-wide logo is an inline SVG mark — a stylized 'AV' ligature built from two overlapping rhombuses with a shared edge, rendered in #E8A020 on #1A1A1F
All decorative background shapes are inline SVG elements using SVG linearGradient from #E8A020 to #C4706A, never raw CSS gradients
Page max-width is 1200px centered; section padding is 96px top/bottom, 48px horizontal on desktop; mobile collapses to 32px horizontal padding
Masked elements use CSS mask-image with inline SVG masks to reveal content through irregular hexagonal or rhombus apertures rather than rectangular crops

page_specs.manifesto: The landing page opens with a full-viewport hero containing the inline SVG 'AV' logo at 180px tall, centered over a field of slowly-tilted parallelogram shapes in varying opacities of #E8A020. Below the fold, three large bold statements — 'Brand is posture.', 'Identity is argument.', 'Design is consequence.' — each appear in Georgia 72px with a diagonal SVG underline drawn as a path in #C4706A. The section is clipped at the bottom with a jagged polygon cut revealing the next section's charcoal background.
page_specs.identity-system: A showcase of Auric Veld's own brand system: the color palette swatches rendered as SVG rhombuses arranged in a honeycomb grid, each labeled with hex and usage note. The typography specimen uses clip-path skew transforms to display the word 'AURIC' in stacked oversized letterforms, each letter masked through a different geometric aperture. A secondary section shows the grid construction of the AV ligature as an animated SVG drawing (stroke-dashoffset CSS animation), explaining the 6-unit modular grid underlying all their client work.
page_specs.projects: A portfolio grid of six client case studies — including 'Nguni Botanicals', 'Cape Quartz Spirits', and 'Maboneng Thread Co.' — displayed as rhombus-shaped tiles arranged in two offset rows of three. Each tile is an inline SVG rect with a clip-path mask revealing a flat color fill and the project name in Georgia italic. Hovering a tile (CSS :hover) shifts its SVG fill from a muted version to the full saffron-rose gradient. A large pull-quote in 48px Georgia spans the full width below the grid: 'Every mark we make is a claim about what matters.'
page_specs.process: A four-phase process timeline rendered as a diagonal SVG path — a thick #E8A020 stroke zigzagging across the page at 45-degree angles — with circular SVG nodes labeled 'Listen', 'Excavate', 'Build', 'Release'. Each phase card sits beside its node, clipped with a parallelogram clip-path, containing a 3-4 sentence description of Auric Veld's methodology. The page ends with a masked banner where the phrase 'We don't decorate. We define.' is revealed through a wide rhombus SVG mask over a dusty-rose #C4706A background block.
page_specs.contact: A minimal contact page anchored by a large inline SVG illustration of a compass rose built from overlapping rhombus petals in saffron and dusty rose, centered at 300px wide, representing orientation and direction in brand work. Below it, a simple text block lists studio address in Maboneng Precinct, Johannesburg, an email address 'hello@auricveld.studio', and Instagram handle '@auricveld'. A secondary decorative element is a row of five small SVG diamond icons in #E8A020 acting as a visual divider. The contact form consists of three fields — Name, Email, Message — styled with bottom-border-only lines in #E8A020 on the dark background, with a submit button clipped to a parallelogram shape.
